Home · Services · Landscape Installation

Landscape Installation

From idea to outdoor space.

Whether you're starting from a blank slate or refreshing what's already there, we handle full landscape installation — plantings, beds, walkways, and the design thinking that ties it all together.

Design consultation
We walk the property with you, talk through what you want, and put together a plan that fits the space, the conditions, and the budget.
Plantings & beds
Trees, shrubs, perennials, and ornamentals chosen for Western New York conditions. New beds shaped, soil prepped, and everything planted properly so it actually thrives.
Walkways & finish work
Walkway installation, bed lines, and the finishing details that take a landscape from "new plantings" to "this looks like it's always been here."
